narrative: An 8-year experienced Search Engineer at Sarvam AI, a product-first company, ranked 42nd. Their verified skill depth primarily drove this ranking. With a strong JD-relevant skill match, including scikit-learn and PyTorch, and experience with search technologies like Milvus and BM25, they align well with the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. However, their location in Gurgaon, outside of the preferred Pune or Noida areas, and minor concerns flagged on their profile credibility, are limitations that impacted their overall ranking.
